_meta.purpose: Value ranges for Precursor Tablet modifiers, used for min/max slider bounds and labels. Editable: update after a patch changes rolls; the plugin also auto-widens a range if it ever reads a higher value in-game.
_meta.id_note: id is the internal mod id (matched to the plugin catalog). The additional-X family and Ritual Rare/Magic naming are best-effort and should be confirmed against the in-game debug dump, which reports the real mod id per line.
_meta.types_note: Real in-game tablet types (0.5): overseer, temple, abyss, breach, delirium, ritual, plus the generic Precursor Tablet and the unique tablets (Irradiated tablets exist only as uniques). Expedition tablets are NOT obtainable, so their mods were removed.
